title: Motherlode Types
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ProspectedAsteroid WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND MotherlodeMaterial IS NOT NULL
detailQuery: SELECT MotherlodeMaterial AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ProspectedAsteroid WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND MotherlodeMaterial IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MotherlodeMaterial ORDER BY value DESC
